[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style drawing shows a small light-haired character with two-tone eyes giving a finger gesture in front of a light background with scattered marks.  

Main Subject:
The main focus is a chibi/anime character with short, light-colored (grayish-white) hair and closed-mouth styling, thick outlines, and a face dominated by large eyes colored in two tones (left eye appears greenish and right eye appears bluish/purplish). The character has a hand raised near the mouth area with a finger extended, covering part of the lower face area. The outfit appears dark with a high collar and layered clothing, with a lighter inner area at the neck and chest.  

Setting:
The background is plain and flat in light beige/yellow tones with a few small scattered line marks, and a curved shape on the right side that looks like part of a speech-bubble or panel element. No real-world environment is shown.  

Visual Details:
The image is cropped tightly around the character’s head and upper torso, angled slightly from the left. Thick black linework defines the eyes, mouth, hair, and clothing. The lighting appears flat and illustrative, with no shadows beyond simple shading. On the right side, there is a gray triangular/angled area partially visible, suggesting a comic-panel layout.  

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:
The image shows an anime-style character with short light hair and two-tone eyes making a hand gesture near the mouth. It is presented as a tight, comic-like close-up against a light background with scattered marks and panel shapes.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

[no readable text found in the screenshot]

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
